summary: Comprehensive testing of Autonomous AI Company Workflow Engine completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly with proper integration.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility

passed_tests: GET /api/health returns healthy status with simulation mode
GET /api/agents returns all 8 agents with correct roles (CEO, CFO, HR, UX, Developer, Frontend, Backend, DevOps)
GET /api/stats returns complete stats object
POST /api/projects creates project and triggers automatic kickoff meeting
GET /api/projects lists projects correctly
GET /api/meetings lists meetings with participants and agenda
GET /api/messages lists dialogue messages from agents
GET /api/threads returns grouped conversation threads
GET /api/tasks lists tasks assigned to agents
PATCH /api/tasks/{id} updates task status successfully
GET /api/decisions lists approval decisions
POST /api/decisions/{id}/vote allows voting on decisions
POST /api/execute triggers project execution and generates artifacts
GET /api/artifacts returns generated artifacts
Dashboard page loads with stats grid, agent team, and projects list
New Project dialog opens and submits project goal successfully
Boardroom page shows 4-panel layout: participants, dialogue transcript, agenda/approvals/tasks tabs, execution bar
Dialogue page shows thread list and message view with search functionality
Delegation page shows tasks grouped by agent with filtering
Approvals page shows decisions with vote buttons and filtering
Projects page shows project list with detail view including tasks, artifacts, meetings tabs
Sidebar navigation works across all pages
Project execution flow works end-to-end
Artifact generation and preview functionality works
Agent dialogue simulation system works correctly
